eda_finding: First-differenced anxiety is more stationary than levels
ACF and PACF both show short-lag signals
Some countries show lag 1–2 dependence/noisier short-run pattern
Seasonal differencing is plausible but not guaranteed
Seasonal AR and MA behavior are both plausible
modeling_decision: Test seasonal AR (1,D,0,12) and seasonal MA (0,D,1,12)
